page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

A primary feature of this instance is its bundled local storage, consisting of 15,358 GB of local SSD capacity. This massive storage volume is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 80 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. The instance runs on a KVM hypervisor and does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.i5e.8xlarge offers high qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive local storage and high memory capacity on a single node. However, the lack of hyperthreading means multi-threaded CPU-bound tasks do not benefit from virtual thread scaling, and the absence of GPU acceleration limits its utility for deep learning workloads.

This hardware configuration is designed for storage-intensive and memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational and non-relational databases, data warehousing, high-throughput log analysis, and distributed file systems that require low-latency access to large local SSD volumes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.8xlarge is a storage-optimized and memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features an Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor with 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz, utilizing a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio without hyperthreading. The instance is provisioned with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a substantial 15,358 GB of local SSD storage. Networking capabilities are supported by an 80 Gbps baseline bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for high-capacity local storage and memory-intensive operations. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and high-throughput analytical workloads that demand significant local storage capacity and fast network performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, 15,358 GB of local SSD storage, and 80 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for databases and storage-heavy workloads.

tagline: A dedicated Intel-powered instance featuring massive local SSD storage and high network bandwidth for demanding database and analytical workloads.
